title: AITA for exposing my best friend's fake pregnancy live at her own baby shower?
script: My best friend Renee invited forty people to her baby shower, cried opening tiny onesies, and cut a cake shaped like a stork, but I'd noticed her stomach hadn't grown in three months of morning sickness selfies. During gift opening I asked to see her ultrasound photo up close, the one she'd posted twice, and there it was in the corner, a watermark from a stock photo site she'd forgotten to crop out. The room went dead silent as I held my phone next to hers, same image, same watermark, timestamped months before she even said she was pregnant. Her mom laughed it off like a joke until Renee grabbed the microphone from the DJ table and screamed that I was jealous because my own IVF had failed twice. Then her husband stood up, phone in his hand, and said quietly that he'd already booked a paternity test for a baby that, according to the hospital he'd just called, was never actually conceived.
